channel.title: UCogNet (Universal Cognition Network) — Metacognitive AI Research
channel.description: Research updates from the UCogNet metacognitive AI platform. Gated evolution, safety budgets, and reproducible benchmarks.

item.title: UCogNet Safety Architecture: 6 Pillars for Gated AI Evolution
item.description: How UCogNet enforces safe self-improvement through A/B gating, cognitive budgets, shaping guardrails, evidence architecture, capability boundaries, and reproducibility requirements.
item.dc:creator: UCogNet Lab

item.title: Benchmark Results: BCI Decoding and Physics Control
item.description: UCogNet evaluated on BNCI2014001 BCI decoding (9 subjects, cross-session, 9/9 threshold pass) and parametric physics control (Module 5, 5 OOD campaigns, cognitive 0.351 vs PID 0.090 under regime shifts).
item.dc:creator: UCogNet Lab

item.title: UCogNet Architecture: Modular Metacognitive Platform
item.description: Technical overview of UCogNet's 10-module architecture: cognitive routing, evidence-driven execution, and gated evolution under strict safety budgets.
item.dc:creator: UCogNet Lab

item.title: Benchmark Proof: 807 Reproducible Tests Across 10 Modules
item.description: Frozen benchmark runs, reproducible test suites, and verifiable evidence from all 10 UCogNet cognitive modules.
item.dc:creator: UCogNet Lab
